caption: A video begins in a high-security vault with grey tiled walls and fluorescent ceiling lights, where gold bars are stacked on metal shelving units. A large banner on the back wall reads "THE GOLD REPORT BY TOM O'BRIEN" alongside a gold-colored graphic. The scene then transitions to a website for TFNN.COM with the slogan "EDUCATING INVESTORS." The webpage features a blue header with navigation links such as "HOME," "TIGER TV," and "NEWSLETTERS." Below the header, a promotional section displays a large image of gold bars and the text "GOLD REPORT NEWSLETTER BY TOM O'BRIEN." A blue "SUBSCRIBE" button is visible above a descriptive paragraph that identifies Tom O'Brien as the founder and CEO of TFNN. At the bottom of this section, a yellow banner reads "Tom O'Brien" next to social media icons for Facebook and Pinterest.
